channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippines and Vietnam strengthen strategic partnership in high-level talks in Malacañang
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. welcomed Vietnamese President and Communist Party General Secretary Tô Lâm to Malacañang Palace on Monday morning for high-level bilateral talks aimed at strengthening t...

item.title: Springbok fly-half Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu sidelined by serious ankle injury
item.description: In a URC quarter-final in Cape Town, Stormers fly-half Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu limped off after scoring a try in a 44-21 win against Cardiff. Stormers coach John Dobson indicated the injury appears ...

item.title: Experts discuss concerns about ‘AI psychosis’ and shifting attitudes toward AI adoption
item.description: This TechCrunch discussion explores the growing debate around so-called “AI psychosis,” a term sparked by Box founder Aaron Levie’s comments suggesting that some tech CEOs may be overly immersed or di...

item.title: Bengaluru Traffic Police book 699 drunk driving cases in week-long citywide enforcement drive
item.description: The Bengaluru Traffic Police conducted a week-long intensive enforcement drive against drunk driving and overspeeding across the city from May 25 to May 31, aimed at improving road safety and reducing...

item.title: Hanson defends leadership prospects as polling shows surge for One Nation
item.description: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson has pushed back against concerns about her age, insisting she remains fit to lead Australia after turning 72. Speaking in a radio interview, Hanson said her ability to...

item.title: A personal account of THC edible use among social circles and its effects
item.description: The article is a first-person account of a woman who decides to stop drinking alcohol and instead tries THC-infused edible gummies, often referred to as ‘edibles’, which contain the psychoactive compo...

item.title: Kitchener Rangers claim Memorial Cup with 6-2 victory over Everett Silvertips
item.description: The Kitchener Rangers secured their third Memorial Cup title in franchise history with a decisive 6-2 victory over the Everett Silvertips in Kelowna, B.C. Early in the third period, Jack Pridham and S...

item.title: Springbok Women’s Sevens finish ninth in Valladolid, boosting core status hopes
item.description: The Springbok Women's Sevens delivered a determined performance at the Valladolid Sevens in Spain, finishing ninth and keeping their hopes of securing core status in the HSBC SVNS Series alive. South ...

item.title: Iran–US nuclear negotiations stall amid renewed distrust following revised US peace proposal
item.description: Iranian officials have publicly reiterated deep mistrust of the United States following reports that US President Donald Trump has returned a revised version of a proposed peace framework with additio...

item.title: Federal Government approves forest guard recruitment and special rescue operation following Oyo school kidnappings
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has approved the recruitment of 1,000 forest guards in Oyo State and ordered the deployment of a specialised rescue team following the abduction of pupils and teachers from schoo...

item.title: United Airlines flight returns to Newark after a teen names Fitbit 'bomb'
item.description: On Saturday night, a United Airlines flight from Newark Liberty International Airport to Palma de Mallorca, Spain, was compelled to return shortly after takeoff due to a potential security concern. Du...

item.title: Pakistan’s cotton imports rise amid falling domestic prices and industry pressure
item.description: Pakistan has emerged as the largest buyer of US cotton for the second consecutive week despite a noticeable decline in domestic cotton and phutti prices during the Eidul Azha holidays. According to ma...

item.title: Wydad Casablanca Shows Interest in Yanga SC Talent Following Aziz Ki Transfer
item.description: Moroccan football club Wydad Casablanca continues to show interest in players from Tanzania, this time targeting a player from Yanga SC after recently signing Aziz Ki. Wydad, one of Africa’s top clubs...

item.title: Six agricultural workers die as speeding Thar collides with autorickshaw in Chikkaballapur
item.description: On Sunday afternoon, a tragic accident occurred in Chikkaballapur district of Karnataka, resulting in the death of six people and injuring four others. The incident involved a speeding Mahindra Thar t...

item.title: Legal community survey signals growing concern over Trump administration's impact on rule of law
item.description: A recent discussion among legal experts highlights growing alarm within the U.S. legal community regarding President Donald Trump’s second administration and its impact on the rule of law. Attorneys B...

item.title: Reassessing Pakistan’s deterrence doctrine in a changing South Asian battlefield
item.description: The article reflects on how South Asia’s strategic environment has evolved 28 years after Pakistan’s nuclear tests at Chagai, arguing that traditional deterrence assumptions are increasingly under str...

item.title: FG Greenlights Massive Upgrade of Sports Facilities Across Nigeria
item.description: The Federal Government don finally give green light for nationwide sports infrastructure overhaul. Abuja’s Moshood Abiola National Stadium dey front and centre for major renovation to meet internation...

item.title: Kerala UDF government’s proposal on menstrual leave for schoolgirls draws debate over privacy and implementation
item.description: The UDF government’s proposal in Kerala to introduce up to three days of menstrual leave per month for schoolgirls has triggered a public debate, with several political leaders expressing concerns ove...

item.title: Rumours and fan theories circulate about Taylor Swift’s possible involvement in Toy Story 5
item.description: The article discusses ongoing speculation among fans about whether global pop star Taylor Swift could be involved in the upcoming animated film ‘Toy Story 5’. According to the report from ABS-CBN Ente...

item.title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Renewed Israel-Hezbollah Conflict in Lebanon
item.description: On 1st June 2026, oil prices experienced a notable rise following Israel's decision to advance troops further into Lebanon in ongoing clashes with the Iranian-backed Hezbollah militant group. This esc...
